queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the impact of lacking a checking account on elevated credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Investigation into the association between checking account balances below zero and decreased credit risk.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Statistical analysis of savings account balances below 100 DM as determinants of increased credit default risk.
